examples: An undertaker had already taken the body to be embalmed.
Shareholders are just waiting for an undertaker.
If you don't object, " turning to the undertaker, "I'll ride with you."
An undertaker's van carrying a silver casket left the hotel early on Tuesday morning for an undisclosed location.
Discretion, competence and a talent for hand-holding are prized of underwriter and undertaker alike.
